briefdescription.para: Adds the time interval *inc to the time at tp.
Adds sec seconds to the time at tp.
Adds msec milliseconds to the time at tp.
Adds usec microseconds to the time at tp.
Adds nsec nanoseconds to the time at tp.
Subtracts the time interval *dec from the time at tp.
Subtracts sec seconds from the time at tp.
Subtracts msec milliseconds from the time at tp.
Subtracts usec microseconds from the time at tp.
Subtracts nsec nanoseconds from the time at tp.
Returns the time difference (in seconds) between *t1 and *t2.

detaileddescription.para: Difference is rounded to full seconds towards zero (with decimals truncated).

briefdescription.para: Returns the time difference (in milliseconds) between *t1 and *t2.

detaileddescription.para: Difference is rounded to full miliseconds towards zero (with decimals truncated).

briefdescription.para: Returns the time difference (in microseconds) between *t1 and *t2.

detaileddescription.para: Difference is rounded to full microseconds towards zero (with decimals truncated).

briefdescription.para: Returns the time difference (in nanoseconds) between *t1 and *t2.

simplesect.para: an integer greater than, equal to, or less than 0 if the time stored at p1 is greater than, equal to, or less than the time stored at p2.

briefdescription.para: This header file is part of the utilities library; it contains the time function declarations.

detaileddescription.para:
